instructions: Remove caps and labels if possible
rules.impact: Recycling plastic saves 80% of energy compared to creating new plastic.
warnings: Do not recycle soft plastics (bags/wrappers) in standard bins.

rules.impact: Recycling one ton of paper saves 17 trees and 7,000 gallons of water.
warnings: Do not recycle food-soiled paper (e.g., greasy pizza boxes).
